title: agropyron kokonoricum
intro: Agropyron kokonoricum, also known as Kokonor wheat grass or Elymus kokonorica, is a type of perennial grass native to the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Agropyron kokonoricum include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, capsules, or tablets, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
